---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Notes de recherche, réflexions sur l'IA africaine, tutoriels techniques et chroniques depuis N'Djaména."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: blog-listing
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  date-format: "DD MMM YYYY"
  image-placeholder: "../assets/img/blog-placeholder.svg"
  feed: true
---

```{=html}
<div class="h-controls" id="blog-controls">
  <div class="h-search">
    <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/></svg>
    <input type="text" id="blogSearchInput" placeholder="Rechercher un article…" oninput="filterBlogCards(this.value)" />
  </div>
  <div class="h-filter-tabs" id="blogCatTabs">
    <button class="h-filter-tab h-active" onclick="setBlogCat('all',this)">Tout</button>
    <button class="h-filter-tab" onclick="setBlogCat('NLP',this)">NLP</button>
    <button class="h-filter-tab" onclick="setBlogCat('Speech AI',this)">Speech AI</button>
    <button class="h-filter-tab" onclick="setBlogCat('Langues tchadiennes',this)">Langues tchadiennes</button>
    <button class="h-filter-tab" onclick="setBlogCat('Machine Translation',this)">Machine Translation</button>
    <button class="h-filter-tab" onclick="setBlogCat('Open Science',this)">Open Science</button>
    <button class="h-filter-tab" onclick="setBlogCat('Data Engineering',this)">Data Engineering</button>
    <button class="h-filter-tab" onclick="setBlogCat('Réflexions',this)">Réflexions</button>
    <button class="h-filter-tab" onclick="setBlogCat('Documentation',this)">Documentation</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
let currentCat = 'all';
function setBlogCat(cat, btn) {
  currentCat = cat;
  document.querySelectorAll('#blogCatTabs .h-filter-tab').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('h-active'));
  btn.classList.add('h-active');
  applyBlogFilter();
}
function filterBlogCards(q) { applyBlogFilter(q); }
function applyBlogFilter(q) {
  const query = (q || document.getElementById('blogSearchInput').value).toLowerCase();
  document.querySelectorAll('.quarto-listing .listing-item').forEach(item => {
    const text  = item.innerText.toLowerCase();
    const cats  = item.querySelectorAll('.listing-category');
    const catMatch = currentCat === 'all' || Array.from(cats).some(c => c.textContent.trim() === currentCat);
    const textMatch = !query || text.includes(query);
    item.style.display = (catMatch && textMatch) ? '' : 'none';
  });
}
</script>
```

::: {#blog-listing}
:::
